creator: mwalker1025@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 161390
I hope I did this properly.

An extremely minor clarity quibble, regarding the phrasing of one sentence of documentation found in section 17.14.3.1: Recovering from the Split-brain Condition.

The original is: "The administrator must decide which node has more important changes or merge them manually."
I would rather state the sentence as: "The administrator must either decide which node has more important changes, or perform the merge manually."

The attached .patch file contains the change as stated here, assuming that I generated it correctly.
